name: The Charles River Jazz Ensemble
description: A world-class 4-piece jazz ensemble bringing sophistication and soul to your wedding. From an elegant ceremony to a swinging reception, we create a live music experience that is warm, intimate, and undeniably classy. Berklee-trained musicians with decades of performance experience.

includes: 4-piece jazz ensemble (piano, upright bass, drums, saxophone)
Custom ceremony song arrangements (up to 3 songs)
3 sets of live music with curated break music
Client song request list (up to 15 songs)
Full amplified setup with PA and monitors
4 sets of live reception music with curated break music
Custom ceremony song arrangements (up to 5 songs)
Client song request list (up to 25 songs)

vocalist.note: Included in full_event, add-on for other packages

equipment_included: Drum kit with brushes and sticks
Ambient break music system (for set breaks)

venue_partnerships.note: Regular performers at The Grand Meridian for upscale events. Know the ballroom acoustics and stage setup intimately.

playlist_consultation.process: In-person or video consultation to discuss musical preferences, special song requests, and custom arrangements. The bandleader works directly with the couple to curate the setlist and arrange any special songs (first dance, parent dances). Final setlist confirmed 3 weeks before the event.
playlist_consultation.song_request_limit: Up to 25 songs for full event, 15 for reception only
playlist_consultation.consultation_timing: 6-8 weeks before event, final setlist 3 weeks before

eco_friendly.note: Not applicable to live music services.

cancellation_policy.under_30_days: Full payment required — musicians already booked and arrangements prepared

highlights: cocktail hour jazz was the perfect touch

sweeteners: Complimentary vocalist add-on for full-event bookings in off-season
Free custom first dance arrangement for any package
Additional musician (trumpet or guitar) at no charge for weekday events
Complimentary 30-minute cocktail hour extension for early bookings
personality: Refined, gracious, and deeply passionate about the craft. The Charles River Jazz Ensemble values artistic quality and the right fit over volume. Berklee-trained musicians with decades of experience. Will not discount base rates but may add musicians or extend sets for the right event. Selective about bookings — ideal for couples who want timeless elegance.
